chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
text:
(a) An applicant for a permit under this subchapter, other than a permit under Section 623.071 (Permit to Move Certain Equipment) (c)(3), must also pay a highway maintenance fee in an amount determined according to the following table:

(b) The department shall send each fee collected under Subsection (a) to the comptroller, who shall deposit:

(1) 90 percent of the fee to the credit of the state highway fund; and

(2) 10 percent of the fee to the credit of the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles fund.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.077 — Highway Maintenance Fee

(a) An applicant for a permit under this subchapter, other than a permit under Section 623.071 (Permit to Move Certain Equipment) (c)(3), must also pay a highway maintenance fee in an amount determined according to the following table:

(b) The department shall send each fee collected under Subsection (a) to the comptroller, who shall deposit:

    (1) 90 percent of the fee to the credit of the state highway fund; and

    (2) 10 percent of the fee to the credit of the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles fund.

*Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1287 (H.B.2202), Sec. 55, eff. September 1, 2013.*

90 percent of the fee to the credit of the state highway fund; and
10 percent of the fee to the credit of the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles fund.
